call_transcript:
Agent: Hi Eleanor, this is Mark calling from Finance Solutions. I see you recently inquired about a personal loan on our website. Um, how are you doing today? 
Eleanor: Good, thanks. 
Agent: Great! So, based on your application, we are pre-approving you for a $10,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 8.99%. This could really help with, you know, consolidating debt or maybe a home improvement project? 
Eleanor: I was thinking more about consolidating some credit card debt. 
Agent: Excellent! That's a very smart move. With this loan, you'd have one fixed monthly payment, and potentially save a significant amount on interest. The monthly payment would be around $200. Does that sound manageable? 
Eleanor: Yeah, that sounds pretty good. What are the fees like? 
Agent: There's a one-time origination fee of $150, and that's it. No prepayment penalties. We pride ourselves on transparency. 
Eleanor: Okay. And the interest rate is fixed, right? 
Agent: Absolutely. 8.99% for the life of the loan. 
Eleanor: Alright, I think I'm ready to move forward. 
Agent: Fantastic! Let's just quickly verify a few details...

Agent: Hello Mr. Miller? This is Sarah calling from Finance Solutions. We're offering a special promotion on our Signature Credit Card. 
Robert: (Sighs) Where did you get my number? I've told you people before, I'm not interested. 
Agent: Sir, I apologize for the inconvenience. We believe this card could offer you valuable rewards and benefits. We are pre-approving you for a $2,500 Signature Credit Card at an interest rate of 19.99%. 
Robert: 19.99?! Are you kidding me? That's highway robbery! I already have a credit card. 
Agent: Well, sir, our card offers cash back on all purchases, and a lower APR after six months of responsible use. 
Robert: Look, I don't need another credit card. And frankly, I'm getting really annoyed with these calls. Put me on your do-not-call list! 
Agent: I understand your frustration, sir. I can certainly add you to the list. Have a good day. (Click)

Agent: Hi Jessica, this is David from Finance Solutions. I'm calling regarding a referral from our partner, GreenTech Solutions. They mentioned you might be interested in a personal loan. 
Jessica: Oh, yeah, I did fill out something online. I'm looking to finance a new laptop and some equipment for my freelance work. 
Agent: Perfect! We can definitely help with that. We are pre-approving you for a $15,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 12.5%. This would give you the flexibility you need. 
Jessica: Wow, $15,000 is a lot. I only need about $3,000. 
Agent: That's fine, we can adjust the loan amount to fit your needs. But having a higher limit available can be useful for future expenses. 
Jessica: Hmm, okay. I've been looking at some options with my bank, too. Their rates seem a little lower. 
Agent: I understand. But often, bank rates don't reflect your actual creditworthiness. Our rate is very competitive, especially considering your self-employment status. Plus, we offer a faster approval process. We can also match or beat any offer you have, within reason. 
Jessica: Really? I'll have to check again. What's the monthly payment on $3,000 at 12.5%? 
Agent: Let me calculate that for you... It would be approximately $60 a month. 
Jessica: Okay, that's not bad. I need to think about it. 
Agent: Absolutely. I can send you a detailed breakdown of the loan terms via email. Would that be helpful?

Agent: Good afternoon, Mr. Davis. This is Lisa from Finance Solutions. I see you expressed interest in our Signature Credit Card online. 
Michael: Yeah, I was just browsing. 
Agent: Great! We are pre-approving you for a $5,000 Signature Credit Card at an interest rate of 14.99%. It offers excellent rewards, including travel points and cash back. 
Michael: What's the credit limit? 
Agent: $5,000, as mentioned. And we can review that after six months of responsible use. 
Michael: Okay. And what's the annual fee? 
Agent: The annual fee is $99. But the rewards you'll earn will easily offset that cost. 
Michael: Hmm. I'm not sure. I'm trying to minimize fees. 
Agent: I understand. How about we waive the annual fee for the first year? That would give you a chance to try the card and see if it's a good fit. 
Michael: Really? You can do that? 
Agent: Absolutely! We want to earn your business. 
Michael: Alright, that sounds much better. Let's do it. 
Agent: Wonderful! Let me just confirm a few details...

Agent: Hello Mrs. Rodriguez? This is Sarah calling from Finance Solutions. We're offering a special loan program... 
Patricia: (Interrupting) Oh, for goodness sake! Not again! You people called me yesterday, and the day before! Where did you even get my number? I told you I'm not interested! 
Agent: Ma'am, I apologize for the repeated calls. We are pre-approving you for a $1,200 Personal Loan at a rate of 24.99%... 
Patricia: 24.99?! That's outrageous! I'm going to report you to the Better Business Bureau! This is harassment! (Click)
